name: NEURAL_SYNC_AI
description: NEURAL_SYNC_AI is a decentralized machine learning platform designed to bridge the gap between high-latency edge computing and real-time inference. By leveraging custom-built neural kernels, the system allows for sub-millisecond data synchronization across distributed nodes.

name: NEURAL_SYNC_V3
description: Sub-millisecond distributed inference kernels with privacy-first synchronization.

name: KUBE_PULSE_MONITOR
description: Real-time telemetry and adaptive routing for container-native inference workloads.

name: CRYPTO_SENTINEL
description: Secure execution pipelines with audited Rust primitives and deterministic attestation.

name: FLUX_ROUTING_ALGO
description: Neon-optimized routing algorithm for low-latency distributed model graphs.

name: GreenPulse_IoT
description: Edge IoT telemetry with adaptive compression and privacy-preserving inference.

name: Neural_Draft_V2
description: An AI-powered collaborative architecture tool that synthesizes spatial requirements into generative 3D wireframes in real-time.
